articles.title: Police officer, 19, dies from crash injuries
articles.description: Jess Turnbull "had so much to look forward to in her career and her life", the chief constable says.

articles.title: Olivia Rodrigo on heartbreak and choosing her wedding song
articles.description: The pop star discusses the difficulty of writing happy songs, and her Glastonbury anxiety attack.

articles.title: Facing a seismic by-election, the people of Makerfield tell us what matters to them
articles.description: In conversations with residents, business owners and campaigners in Makerfield, the BBC found a mixed mood.

articles.title: Serena Williams' run at Queen's over as partner Victoria Mboko withdraws
articles.description: Serena Williams' doubles campaign at Queen's is curtailed as her playing partner Victoria Mboko withdraws with a left knee injury.
